feed.description: Mountain biking talk: trails, technique, gear, and the people who build the ride.
feed.title: Singletrack Sessions

bullets: Welcome back to Singletrack Sessions. I'm with Sophie Laurent, enduro racer and coach. Sophie, good to have you.
Thanks, Maya. Always happy to talk shop.
People think racing is about nerve. You say it's about risk.
summary.raw_text: Welcome back to Singletrack Sessions. I'm with Sophie Laurent, enduro racer and coach. Sophie, good to have you.
summary.title: The Risk You Didn't Name
